query:
select
            (
                select count(*)
                from project_attribution_groups
                where project_id = $1
            ) as "groups!",
            (
                select count(*)
                from project_attribution_files paf
                inner join project_attribution_groups pag on pag.id = paf.group_id
                where pag.project_id = $1
            ) as "files!"
